name: sport-booking-app-v1
description: Capstone monorepo: Next.js web/backend + Expo mobile + shared packages

scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports = @(3000,3010,8081,8090); foreach ($p in $ports) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Unique OwningProcess; foreach ($c in $conns) { try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } }; Write-Output 'Dev ports cleaned.'"
scripts.dev:fresh: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run dev:clean; npm run dev"
scripts.dev:all:fresh: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run dev:clean; npm run dev:all"
